summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CliniKQ Phase 1 MVP - multi-tenant clinic operational platform. Backend APIs (21/21) working perfectly. Frontend functionality mostly working with one minor UI layout issue.

ui_bugs.issue: Save Settings button blocked by sidebar logout button overlay in certain screen positions
ui_bugs.workaround: Force click works, functional but UX issue

issues: React hydration warnings in console for table rows and select options
design_issues.technical_note: Console shows 'span cannot be a child of tbody/select' warnings but functionality works

passed_tests: Super Admin dashboard metrics display (4 clinics, 2 active)
Super Admin clinics list view and management
Super Admin clinic creation with all required fields
Super Admin clinic editing and feature toggles
Clinic Admin patients list and management
Clinic Admin patient creation (UI Test Patient)
Clinic Admin appointments list with status badges
Clinic Admin settings management (partial - form fields work)
Role-based access control (clinic admin blocked from super admin routes)
Login form validation for invalid credentials
Navigation between all pages for both user roles
Logout functionality for both user types
Frontend form submissions and backend integration
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix sidebar layout positioning issue on settings page where logout button overlaps save button. Also investigate React hydration warnings in console.
